runners.formComment: Solid performance to win by 0.8 lengths at Sale over 435m (24.69) beating Always Share in Grade 5 on April 12. Has run very fast time at this course and distance. Go close on his best form.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Solid performance to win by 0.8 lengths at Sale over 435m (24.69) beating Always Share in Grade 5 on April 12. Has run very fast time at this course and distance. Go close on his best form.

runners.formComment: Placed last time (22.36) at this track in a Mix 3/4, finishing third and beaten 6 lengths. Yet to score but has placed each of two runs from this draw. Has ability and should be around the money.

formComments.title: TAB

runners.formComment: Impressive performance leading throughout to score by 2.5 lengths in a Grade 5 last start at Warragul, clocking a hot 22.48 for the 400m trip. Expected to go close again if runs up to latest time.

formComments.title: TAB

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin; Checked and fell turning out of front straight.
Quick to begin; Raced wide turning out of front straight.

runners.formComment: Charged out of the boxes with a fast early sectional but gathered in and finished in the minors when third (23.58) at Horsham over 410m. Racing well and can find winning form again.

formComments.title: TAB

runners.formComment: Won his last two including a good win last start over 390m at Shepparton by one length in a Free For All. Top chance to chalk-up the hat-trick.

formComments.title: TAB

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Collided on the first turn, stumbled, lost ground and fell.

runners.formComment: Got back last start and could only manage fifth but before that won by half a length at this track (22.15) beating Bull Durham in a Grade 5 on April 1. Will need to improve to feature.

runners.formComment: Hasn't threatened at her last couple but she has solid credentials over this track and distance. Looks a solid hope.

runners.formComment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage sixth last time out over 300m at Healesville. Looking to others this time.
